title: sessionSummarizer.ts — AI tile summaries (hybrid local→cloud)
description: Reads last 20-30 jsonl events + aiTitle. Hybrid provider: ollama first via sweech auto --provider ollama, fallback to sweech auto --budget 0.005. Writes summary_one/bullets/provider/model/cost/at to sessions.db. Debounced queue; eager every 50 msgs + on session-end; lazy on viewport scroll. SSE summary.updated events.
